_note: Pi custom-provider config for the Ikey test gateway. TEMPLATE: __GOPILOT_REPO__ is replaced with the repo's absolute path by install.sh / scripts/pi-ikey.sh at install time (never edit ~/.pi/agent/models.json to contain the literal placeholder). The apiKey command reads WORKHORSE_GATEWAY_KEY from deploy/.env at runtime — no hardcoded secret. Merge into an existing ~/.pi/agent/models.json if you already have other custom providers.
